title: thelypteris heterophlebia
intro: Thelypteris heterophlebia, also known as the lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Thelypteris heterophlebia include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
